summary: #75869 is the canonical automerge repair target. The hydrated preflight shows a passed ClawSweeper review and green checks at head 989191c5e87be36ddf38812a424fcb2b6cc79f1b, but GitHub reports the PR as dirty/conflicting against current main 3451ea9761cc3d2e41d35c82cb0e065db3160209. The branch is same-repo writable, so the executable path is to repair the existing contributor branch, not replace it. #75186 is separate Gateway plugin-management RPC work and should stay independent of this repair cluster.

actions.reason: Repair the existing writable PR branch by rebasing/resolving conflicts, then rerun exact-head review and changed-surface validation before any later automerge router decision.
Same product area, different implementation surface and review path; not a duplicate or replacement for #75869.
A concrete repair artifact is needed for the deterministic executor to update the existing PR branch.
